description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant featuring a cluster of tall, glossy green leaves that rise vertically from a rounded base. The leaves have a smooth, almost waxy appearance, with subtle variations in green tones and some lighter spots. At the base, several thick, pale green roots or tendrils spread outward over a dark, soil-like surface, giving the impression of a plant that is both organic and slightly fantastical. Small, round, beige nodules or bulbs are nestled among the roots, adding visual interest and texture. The pot itself is not distinctly visible, as the roots and soil dominate the base, but the overall form suggests a contained, upright plant suitable for decorative use. The design is eye-catching and would stand out in an urban park or garden bed.
description: A stylized potted plant with tall, glossy green leaves, spreading roots, and small beige bulbs on a dark soil base. The plant has a fantastical, organic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cluster of tall, shiny green leaves, spreading roots, and several beige bulbs at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical arrangement of the leaves and the way the roots extend over the soil base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the leaf cluster and more of the root system, with bulbs partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the curvature of the leaves and the intertwining roots at the base.
